subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: How great the results that would have appeared if these people [who were well-versed in Islamic jurisprudence and doctrine] had practised that kind of hair-splitting on matters of actual importance!
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر آنگونه موشکافیها در مسائل مهمّه می‌نمودند چه قدر نتائج داشت
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @Islamic laws and jurisprudence
